Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.RestAuthenticator

Packages that use RestAuthenticator
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
REST Servlets

  • Uses of RestAuthenticator in org.apache.juneau.rest.server

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that return types with arguments of type RestAuthenticator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<RestAuthenticator>
    RestContext.getEffectiveAuthenticators()
    Returns the effective (root-to-this) authenticator chain for this resource.
    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.rest.server with type arguments of type RestAuthenticator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestAnnotation.Builder
    RestAnnotation.Builder.authenticator(Class<? extends RestAuthenticator> value)
    Sets the Rest.authenticator() property on this annotation.

  • Uses of RestAuthenticator in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth

    Subclasses of RestAuthenticator in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    RestAuthenticator.Null
    Sentinel "unset" type for @Rest(authenticator=...); never authenticates.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth that return RestAuthenticator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static RestAuthenticator
    RestAuthenticator.of(Authenticator a)
    Adapts any Authenticator (e.g. an AuthFilter or AuthFilterChain bean) into a RestAuthenticator.

  • Uses of RestAuthenticator in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet that return RestAuthenticator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestAuthenticator
    RestServlet.createAuthenticator(BeanStore beanStore)
    Returns the resource-level authenticator for this servlet, or null to fall through to the @Rest(authenticator=...) annotation / registered bean / @Bean factory method.
